name: Crawfordsville Parks & Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Crawfordsville Parks & Recreation Center in Crawfordsville, IN! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved.
fees: Fee required — Drop-in fees or membership

name: Lincoln Park
description: Lincoln Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crawfordsville, IN. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include water. The courts are free.
